test.query: SELECT sum(arrayMin(a)) FROM (SELECT arrayMap(i -> toFloat64((number + i) % 97), range(1, 41)) AS a FROM numbers(5000000)) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(arrayMax(a)) FROM (SELECT arrayMap(i -> toFloat64((number + i) % 97), range(1, 41)) AS a FROM numbers(5000000)) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(arrayMin(a)) FROM (SELECT arrayMap(i -> toInt64((number * 3 + i) % 9973), range(1, 41)) AS a FROM numbers(5000000)) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(arrayMax(a)) FROM (SELECT arrayMap(i -> toInt64((number * 3 + i) % 9973), range(1, 41)) AS a FROM numbers(5000000)) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(arrayMin(a)) FROM (SELECT arrayMap(i -> toFloat64((number + i) % 97), range(1, 513)) AS a FROM numbers(400000)) FORMAT Null
SELECT sum(arrayMax(a)) FROM (SELECT arrayMap(i -> toInt64((number * 3 + i) % 9973), range(1, 513)) AS a FROM numbers(400000)) FORMAT Null
